summary.data_quality_assessment: Mixed - Many executives protect personal contact info. Company emails/phones readily available for most. LinkedIn essential for outreach.
summary.recommended_next_step: Use RocketReach paid subscription for complete email unmask + phone numbers. Alternatively: Company main lines + executive offices.
